scripts.dev: bun --bun concurrently --kill-others-on-fail 'bun run dev:frontend' 'bun run dev:backend'
scripts.build: bun run build:frontend && bun run build:backend
scripts.db:init: bun run --bun prisma migrate dev --name init
scripts.db:reset: bun rimraf backend/database/migrations && bun run --bun prisma migrate reset && bun db:init
